nasb.text: “Son of man, how is the wood of the vine better than any wood of a branch which is among the trees of the forest?

esv.text: “Son of man, how does the wood of the vine surpass any wood, the vine branch that is among the trees of the forest?

cnv.text: “人子啊！葡萄樹的木料怎能勝過樹林中的枝子呢？

ccb.text: “人子啊，葡萄木比林中其他木材更好吗？
